tweet: shipped image inputs for flux-2-dev and fixed a routing quirk where suno forgot how to make music. plus better app attribution and 6 new community apps hitting the showcase. 11 PRs merged today.
alt_tweet: turns out if you route suno models correctly, they actually generate music. fixed that. also shipped image-to-image for flux-2-dev, app url tracking, and merged 6 new community apps. a solid day of plumbing.
image_prompt: Dynamic cozy 8-bit pixel art scene. The cute bee mascot wearing tiny DJ headphones is plugging a glowing lime green (#ecf874) audio cable into a chunky retro terminal. Next to her, a cute robot with a CRT monitor head displays a generated landscape on its screen, raising its stubby arms in celebration. High contrast scroll-stopping composition against a dark purple (#110518) and lavender background. Soft warm lighting, chunky sprites, nostalgic retro gaming vibes.
reasoning: leads with concrete shipments, uses dry humor for the routing fix, lowercase casual energy, highlights community growth.
